product_updates.title: Microsoft is working on yet another OpenClaw-like agent
product_updates.content: The new features would be geared toward enterprise customers, with better security controls than the famously risky open source OpenClaw agent.

product_updates.title: Stanford report highlights growing disconnect between AI insiders and everyone else
product_updates.content: Stanford’s latest AI Index shows a widening gap between experts and the public, with rising anxiety over jobs, healthcare, and the economy.

product_updates.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch signals IPO readiness as AI agents fuel revenue surge
product_updates.content: While many startups founded prior to the emergence of ChatGPT are struggling to position themselves for the AI era, Vercel, a 10-year-old dev tool and website hosting platform, is benefiting from the explosion of AI-generated apps and agents.

product_updates.title: The largest orbital compute cluster is open for business
product_updates.content: Kepler Communications is flying 40 GPUs in Earth orbit. And its latest customer is Sophia Space.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Want to understand the current state of AI? Check out these charts.
technical_breakthroughs.content: If you’re following AI news, you’re probably getting whiplash. AI is a gold rush. AI is a bubble. AI is taking your job. AI can’t even read a clock. technical_breakthroughs.title: Job titles of the future: Wildlife first responder
technical_breakthroughs.content: Grizzly bears have made such a comeback across eastern Montana that in 2017, the state hired its first-ever prairie-based grizzly manager: wildlife biologist Wesley Sarmento.
